summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of MealTalks landing page. All sections, interactions, and responsive behavior working perfectly. Static page with no backend APIs tested successfully.

backend_issues.note: No backend APIs - static frontend-only landing page

passed_tests: Header with 'Meal talks' logo and 'Launch app' button renders correctly
Hero section displays heading, subtext, App Store buttons, and phone mockups
Features section shows 6 feature cards with hover effects and correct heading
All 6 feature cards present: Photo & Chat Logging, Auto Calorie Estimation, Personalized Daily Goals, Real-Time Food Feedback, Progress & Trends View, Support for Local Foods
Habits section displays heading and phone mockups correctly
AI section shows heading and chat phone mockup
Testimonial section with orange gradient, Priya M quote from Founder Circle
Footer with company links (About, Testimonials, Apps) and help links (Help center, Contact support, Instructions, How it works)
App Store and Google Play buttons functional in hero and footer
All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Page fully responsive on desktop (1920x1080), tablet (768x1024), and mobile (390x844)
Page scrollable with smooth navigation between sections
Phone mockups display correctly with detailed inner UI content
All buttons clickable (Launch app buttons, App Store buttons)
Feature card hover effects working properly
No JavaScript errors or console warnings
Typography using Playfair Display and Plus Jakarta Sans fonts correctly
Primary orange color (#FF7A45) used consistently throughout
